stemHtml: IFR in VMC, comm failure. What should the pilot do?

options.a: Continue to destination adding 500 ft to altitudes.
options.b: Continue VMC to destination, land within 30 min of ETA.
options.c: Continue VMC, land at nearest suitable aerodrome, report arrival to ATC.
options.d: Squawk 7700 and continue per flight plan.
